mnemonics.title: Thread Components (S.P.R.C.)
mnemonics.content: A thread has its own **S**tack, **P**rogram Counter, **R**egisters, and **C**ontext. It Shares the process's **C**ode, **D**ata, **H**eap, and **R**esources.

mnemonics.title: Multithreading Models (M.O.M.)
mnemonics.content: **M**any-to-One: **M**any user, **O**ne kernel. **O**ne-to-One: **O**ne user, **O**ne kernel. **M**any-to-Many: **M**any user, **M**any kernel (but a smaller pool).
